item.title: lancedb / lance
item.description:
Desc: Modern columnar data format for ML and LLMs implemented in Rust. Convert from parquet in 2 lines of code for 100x faster random access, vector index, and data versioning. Compatible with Pandas, DuckDB, Polars, Pyarrow, with more integrations coming..
Lang: Rust
Star: 1894

item.title: postgresml / postgresml
item.description:
Desc: PostgresML is an AI application database. Download open source models from Huggingface, or train your own, to create and index LLM embeddings, generate text, or make online predictions using only SQL.
Lang: Rust
Star: 3012
